content.rendered:
1. Introduction

Welcome to Emerald Diary (the “Website”). Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you visit our website and interact with our content, including affiliate products from CJ.com, Amazon, and other partners.

By using our website, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of our site.

2. Information We Collect

a) Personal Information (Provided by You)

  • Name
  • Email address (for newsletters, inquiries, or contact forms)
  • Any other details you submit via forms or surveys

b) Non-Personal Information (Automatically Collected)

  • IP address
  • Browser type and device details
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referral sources (how you arrived at our site)

c) Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and third-party tracking tools to improve our site, analyze traffic, and display relevant advertisements. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.

3. How We Use Your Information

  • Improving website performance and user experience
  • Sending newsletters (if subscribed)
  • Providing personalized content and product recommendations
  • Running ads and affiliate marketing campaigns
  • Complying with legal obligations

4. Affiliate Disclosure

Emerald Diary participates in affiliate programs, including:

  • Amazon Associates
  • CJ Affiliate (CJ.com)
  • Other third-party networks

This means we may earn commissions when you click on affiliate links and make purchases. These commissions do not affect the price you pay for the product.

Amazon Disclosure: As an Amazon Associate, we earn from qualifying purchases.

5. Third-Party Services and Advertisers

We work with third-party services such as:

  • Google Ads & Facebook Ads – To display personalized advertisements
  • Affiliate Networks – To track commissions and referrals
  • Analytics Tools (Google Analytics, etc.) – To understand visitor behavior

These services may collect data independently. Please review their privacy policies for more details.

6. Your Privacy Rights

  • Opt-Out of Emails – You can unsubscribe from our newsletters at any time.
  • Disable Cookies – Manage cookie settings through your browser.
  • Request Data Deletion – Contact us if you wish to delete your personal information.

To make a request, email us at ceciliabharrell@gmail.com.

7. Data Protection and Security

We implement security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access. However, no website is 100% secure. Use our website at your own risk.

8. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page, and we encourage you to review it periodically.

9. Contact Us

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: ceciliabharrell@gmail.com

Website: https://myemeralddiary.com/

© 2025 Emerald Diary. All Rights Reserved.
